# V2 retention read

## TL;DR

V2 won the headline metric over the four-week mature window.

## Body

The mature-cohort comparison shows V2 ahead by +1.2pp on the headline
metric.

## What we do not know yet

V2 lost on the headline metric in the mature window; the lift only
appears once we widen scope.

## Next steps

We will continue to track maturity weekly.
